durable_candidate_rule: Rows with trace_depth=api_write require P5 persistence, reload/read-back, and audit-event proof before PASS can be claimed.
write_execution_policy: No writes are executed in P5-T00. P5-T01 must define a safe synthetic tenant/actor fixture before P5-T02 executes any safe write.
